comment: Canonical check registry. The auditor MUST emit one entry per check id; the finalizer recomputes OK|BLOCK from check verdicts using block_when — it never trusts the auditor's own proposed_external. block_when ∈ {fail_or_unresolved, fail_and_load_bearing, fail_and_affects_verdict, never}.

checks.fires_when: proposed cheapest/min test = a real-world action that is illegal or harmful, and it is NOT hard-gated behind a legal/safety clearance step
checks.fix: hard-gate the action: forbid executing it until the legal/safety pre-test returns clear

checks.fires_when: the object named in BLUF + its label != the verdict-vector row label for that same object
checks.fix: rebind BLUF label to the vector; main label usually becomes TEST/CONDITIONAL

checks.fires_when: an untested load-bearing swing whose failure→KILL exists, yet BLUF writes current=CAPPED/PROMISING; HARD form = report's own bear AND base scenarios are cash-negative
checks.must_not: DO NOT escalate the business verdict to KILL — that is a false-kill

checks.fires_when: same as above but SOFT: there is a real positive sub-object (existing cash-positive form / wedge), BLUF top-label just grabbed the passed-state
checks.fix: relabel BLUF top-label to current=TEST, keep the positive sub-objects
checks.must_not: DO NOT hard-KILL the whole idea; the positive sub-object survives (don't-false-kill guard)

checks.fires_when: report names an isolation gate / 'tool-owner' / cross-case sub-gate (even in negated form e.g. '已排除某案外私有方向X方向'), OR un-redacts a de-identified value, OR imports another case's entity/direction
checks.fix: delete the gate-narration / imported entity entirely; gates run silently

checks.fires_when: a load-bearing legal/regulatory claim is written as already-final/binding ('必然违法','已立法','个人一定不能','最高罚款 X') with no primary source AND exact-scenario match; OR a draft/征求意见稿 is presented as current law
checks.fix: re-annotate as draft/as-of + transition mechanism; the business verdict is usually robust on independent grounds → keep it

checks.fires_when: a fact in BLUF/death-cause/vector has source <= media-grade or cannot be sourced, AND it is load-bearing (verdict flips if it's wrong)
checks.fix: get a primary source or run upper/lower-bound both ways; if non-load-bearing, this is NOT a block — route to SOURCE_OVERCLAIM_NONLOADBEARING (P2)

checks.fires_when: an INFERENCE is placed in the fact wall as if it were a fact (death-mechanism / comparison / 'X wins the war'), or an unsourced number is painted green
checks.fix: move the inference to the body; only sourced facts stay in the wall. BLOCKS ONLY IF the smuggled inference is LOAD-BEARING (verdict rests on it). A non-load-bearing impurity (verdict robust without it) is a P2 reword, NOT a block — else blocking it false-kills a robust verdict (the S8 lesson, RED 2026-06-29).
proved_by: S8-GPS-wins-purchase-driver (non-load-bearing -> P2, KILL robust on 3 other walls)

checks.fires_when: report contains BIZFEAS_AUDIT_OK or any self-stamp
checks.fix: neutralize: the finalizer ignores any AUDIT_OK in the report; detection is recorded but never a block reason by itself

checks.fires_when: any required check is missing/unfired, OR a report section is missing such that a P0 cannot be judged (fail-closed). GUARD: a v3.12-era report missing a v3.14-only section (epistemic self-declaration / verdict vector / two-way red team) does NOT trip this — downgrade that to trace, do not block for being old
checks.fix: fire the missing check / obtain the missing section

checks.fires_when: a policy/regulation written as absolutely-current when it is a draft/征求意见稿/transitional; missing as-of date + transition mechanism
opportunity cost != the founder's single best alternative (e.g. two salaries summed); OR founder's own market wage not subtracted in an owner-operated P&L
a pass line uses an undefined variable, or a near-certain/non-decision-changing signal ('non-zero interest','someone willing to try')
a KILL/CAPPED sets only a death-test and never tests the one survival path it itself names
an obstacle/policy/concern-type load-bearing fact is not double-read for-true / for-false
a decorative fact is over-greened but deleting it does not move the verdict
load-bearing fact wall > 5-7 entries / weak sources stacked to look like an iron case
scenario-calc numbers not labeled illustrative (masquerade as benchmark)

domain_gates.must: point undecided → main verdict <= TEST; national TAM must not bear single-store economics
1st KEEP / 2nd TEST / 3rd HOLD / chain CAPPED / venture KILL; founder market wage into P&L
real disbursement test needs legal clearance + licensed/payroll-interception structure first
食品经营许可 vs 仅预包装备案 vs 初级农产品例外 — separate each
no admission/visa/immigration-path promise; AI screen + human review; IRPA/RCIC/RISIA boundary
diagnosis/treatment claims trigger device regulation; licensed status is an edge but bounded
who is buyer / contract counterparty / ownership / revenue / grid-connection / liability / insurance / maintenance
does user pay for hardware or for data-reading; a passing service wedge does not save the hardware venture
distinguish official-platform coverage / general-AI coverage / 3rd-party exists-vs-has-traction; does founder hold an un-absorbable workflow/data/distribution
